response.overview: The production process of independent film director Yoshimi Noyori's new film was to be featured in a documentary program, but what the program staff saw on set was the intense learning of the director and staff. Troubles and misfortunes that befell them one after another pushed them to their physical and mental limits, eventually leading to a deadly death.
response.tagline: Which came first, illness or something else?
response.title: The Road

titles.title: The Road: The Woman Who Shoots Movies With Her Uterus

release_dates.note: Released together with 不詳の人. Please note the runtime of 110 on this DVD includes both films together.
